text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Netanyahu said that countries that “wage a diplomatic war” against Israel will pay “an immediate price.” Israel will not remain silent in the face of those who attack us. Spain has defamed our heroes, IDF soldiers — the soldiers of the most moral army in the world, Those who attack Israel instead of terrorist regimes — whoever does so — will not be our partner regarding the future of the region. I am not prepared to tolerate this hypocrisy and this hostility. I do not intend to allow any country to wage a diplomatic war against us without paying an immediate price. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从位于基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的美国民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中除名。该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据一份声明……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 内塔尼亚胡表示，那些对以色列“发动外交战争”的国家将付出“即时代价”。面对那些攻击我们的人，以色列不会保持沉默。西班牙诽谤了我们的英雄，即以色列国防军士兵——世界上最道德军队的士兵。那些攻击以色列而不是恐怖政权的人——无论谁这样做——都不会成为我们在该地区未来的伙伴。我不会容忍这种虚伪和敌意。我不打算允许任何国家在不付出即时代价的情况下对我们发动外交战争。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇪🇸 In a post on X, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said Netanyahu’s “contempt for life and international law is intolerable” in light of the attacks. “It’s time to speak clearly: – Lebanon must be included in the ceasefire. – The international community must…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from the Israeli Foreign Ministry, the move was carried out in coordination with the United States, and Spain has been formally notified of the decision. The CMCC was set up to monitor the ceasefire but is heavily slanted to protecting Israeli interests in the ceasefire agreement. It was joined by at least 14 countries and dozens of international organizations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇪🇸 在 X 上的一篇帖子中，首相佩德罗·桑切斯表示，鉴于这些袭击，内塔尼亚胡对生命和国际法的‘蔑视是不可容忍的’。‘是时候明确表态了：——黎巴嫩必须被纳入停火协议。——国际社会必须……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从位于基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的美国民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中除名。该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据以色列外交部的一份声明，此举是与美国协调进行的，西班牙已正式收到该决定通知。CMCC 的设立是为了监督停火，但在停火协议中严重偏向保护以色列的利益。至少有 14 个国家和数十个国际组织加入了该中心。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇩🇪 Fedorov: 🗣️ “Air defense, drones, and data exchange are key priorities in cooperation with Germany ahead of the Ramstein meeting.” 📌 He confirmed a working discussion with German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius. ▪️ Joint projects being prepared with Germany include: 🔹 Significant strengthening of air defense 🔹 Additional funding for drones, especially for deep and mid-range strike capabilities 🔹 Development of joint technological solutions 🔹 New formats for battlefield data exchange 🔹 Cooperation is also expanding into innovative areas, including projects related to laser technologies. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇩🇪 费多罗夫：🗣️ “在拉姆施泰因会议之前，防空、无人机和数据交换是与德国合作的关键优先事项。” 📌 他确认了与德国国防部长鲍里斯·皮斯托留斯的工作讨论。 ▪️ 与德国准备的联合项目包括： 🔹 大幅加强防空能力 🔹 为无人机提供额外资金，特别是针对深层和中程打击能力 🔹 开发联合技术解决方案 🔹 战场数据交换的新格式 🔹 合作也正在扩展到创新领域，包括与激光技术相关的项目。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarMonitor ICE moved detainees out of a Mesa facility ahead of a lawmaker visit, then it returned to being over capacity afterward. Designed for 157 people, it has reached up to 800 between inspections, with detainees packed side by side or even on top of each other “like sardines.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042681738606813544/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在议员访问之前，美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）将梅萨（Mesa）设施中的被拘留者转移了出去，之后该设施又恢复到超负荷状态。该设施设计容量为 157 人，但在检查期间人数一度达到 800 人，被拘留者被挤在一起，甚至像“沙丁鱼”一样堆叠在一起。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042681738606813544/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Tucker Carlson Network Responds to Trump: He’s in a Tough Spot. Establishment media never reports this, but the Israeli government has a storied history of blackmailing U.S. presidents. Perhaps the most jarring example occurred in the 90s, when Israel used recordings of a Bill Clinton-Monica Lewinsky phone sex session as leverage to pressure Clinton into releasing convicted spy Jonathan Pollard from prison. We’re not joking. That really happened. The phone sex story is worth remembering as President Trump attempts to end the Iran War. Like many other things Israel has done, it shows that America’s “special ally” is willing to play very dirty to achieve its goals. Dark-money campaign contributions, extortion, physical threats, and even assassination. In their anti-Christian worldview, the ends always justify the means. They have no issue destroying lives. Israel’s current top priority is making sure Operation Epic Fury does not stop. They know the U.S. fighting their war for them is the best chance at expanding their borders and becoming a global superpower, and a peace deal would foil their plot. Based on the country’s past, its leaders are doubtlessly willing to push as hard as necessary to ensure the bloodshed continues. That could mean Clinton-style blackmail against Trump, or something far more morbid. We do not know for sure whether that is happening, but the mere possibility is haunting enough to keep the president up at night. He is under a level of pressure that most people cannot fathom, with rabid Israel Firsters viciously harassing him any time he dares to stray even slightly from their favorite country’s agenda. Their shameless pursuit is steadfast enough to make even a man like Donald Trump go mad. They are as persistent as any group in history, no matter how well the White House has treated them in the past. They are never grateful, they always want more, and they refuse to give the president even an inch of breathing room. It is an unrelenting full-court press. We decided to write about this after Trump published a Truth Social post attacking our company, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, each of whom supported him for years. Rather than engaging in petty name-calling, we want to give the president some grace. He is facing a level of pressure that is dark enough to make him abandon his campaign promises and morph into the precise kind of politician he once vowed to destroy. He would not have let that happen unless his personal stakes were really high. We hope he overcomes. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel Tucker Carlson Network 回应特朗普：他处境艰难。主流媒体从不报道这一点，但以色列政府有勒索美国总统的悠久历史。也许最令人震惊的例子发生在 90 年代，当时以色列利用比尔·克林顿与莫妮卡·莱温斯基的电话性爱录音作为筹码，迫使克林顿释放被定罪的间谍乔纳森·波拉德。我们不是在开玩笑。那是真的发生了。在特朗普总统试图结束伊朗战争时，值得记住这个电话性爱的故事。就像以色列所做的许多其他事情一样，它表明美国的“特殊盟友”为了实现其目标愿意采取非常卑劣的手段。黑钱竞选捐款、勒索、人身威胁，甚至暗杀。在他们反基督教的世界观中，目的总是证明手段的正当性。他们摧毁生命毫无顾忌。以色列目前的首要任务是确保“史诗愤怒行动”（Operation Epic Fury）不会停止。他们知道美国为他们打仗是他们扩大边界并成为全球超级大国的最佳机会，而和平协议将破坏他们的阴谋。基于该国的过去，其领导人无疑愿意尽一切必要手段确保流血事件继续下去。这可能意味着对特朗普进行克林顿式的勒索，或者更可怕的事情。我们不能确定这是否正在发生，但仅仅这种可能性就足以让总统彻夜难眠。他承受着大多数人无法想象的压力，每当他敢于稍微偏离他们最喜欢的国家的议程时，狂热的“以色列优先”分子就会恶毒地骚扰他。他们无耻的追求是如此坚定，足以让唐纳德·特朗普这样的人也发疯。无论白宫过去对待他们有多好，他们都是历史上最执着的群体之一。他们从不感恩，总是想要更多，并且拒绝给总统哪怕一英寸的喘息空间。这是一场无情的全场紧逼。在特朗普发布 Truth Social 帖子攻击我们公司、梅根·凯利（Megyn Kelly）、坎迪斯·欧文斯（Candace Owens）和亚历克斯·琼斯（Alex Jones）之后，我们决定写这篇文章，他们每个人多年来都支持他。与其进行琐碎的谩骂，我们想给总统一些宽容。他面临的压力之大，足以让他放弃竞选承诺，变成他曾经发誓要摧毁的那种政客。除非他的个人利害关系非常高，否则他不会让这种情况发生。我们希望他能克服。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to Reuters, President Trump has acknowledged in private discussions with advisers that the Strait of Hormuz is unlikely to fully reopen in the near term, despite publicly stating that oil flows will resume quickly. text: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - The Pakistan Air Force ( #PAF ) escorted Iranian delegation planes as soon as they entered Pakistani airspace. The PAF 317 callsign belongs to a Saab 2000 EW aircraft most likely flying along fighter jets.
text_zh: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - 巴基斯坦空军（#PAF）在伊朗代表团飞机进入巴基斯坦领空后立即为其护航。PAF 317 呼号属于一架萨博 2000 预警机，很可能与战斗机一起飞行。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan : Hamas has told the Trump administration’s Board of Peace that it will not disarm without a “comprehensive solution” including a full Israeli withdrawal from Gaza and an end to the blockade. An internal Hamas document obtained by Kan states that the group views its weapons as legitimate defence as long as the "occupation continues." Hamas refuses to link reconstruction to disarmament, calling the proposal “unrealistic”. It insists that security mechanisms remain in place to prevent a vacuum. Israel assesses the response will be rejected and is preparing operational plans to resume fighting in Gaza. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：哈马斯已告知特朗普政府的和平委员会，除非达成包括以色列完全撤出加沙和结束封锁在内的“全面解决方案”，否则它不会解除武装。Kan 获得的一份哈马斯内部文件显示，该组织认为只要“占领继续”，其武器就是合法的防御手段。哈马斯拒绝将重建与解除武装挂钩，称该提议“不现实”。它坚持要求保留安全机制以防止出现真空。以色列评估该回应将被拒绝，并正在制定恢复加沙战斗的作战计划。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: We targeted an Israeli enemy gathering in the vicinity of Al-Ishraq School in the city of Bint Jbeil for the third time with rockets.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 真主党：我们第三次用火箭弹袭击了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市 Al-Ishraq 学校附近的以色列敌军集结地。

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran views Vice President JD Vance as one of the most anti-war figures in President Trump's inner circle, Reuters reports. A White House official said it was "Trump's decision alone" to send Vance to Pakistan for the talks and that the president will make the final call about what deal ​is acceptable. Another White House official said the Iranians had indicated they wanted Vance to ‌get involved ⁠in the talks. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据路透社报道，伊朗将副总统 JD·万斯视为特朗普总统核心圈中最反战的人物之一。一位白宫官员表示，派遣万斯前往巴基斯坦进行会谈是“特朗普的个人决定”，总统将对什么协议是可以接受的做出最终决定。另一位白宫官员表示，伊朗人已表示希望万斯参与会谈。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. inflation jumped sharply in just one month, hitting its highest level in two years, driven largely by rising energy costs tied to the Iran war. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042674056177111366/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国通胀在一个月内急剧跳升，达到两年来的最高水平，这在很大程度上是由与伊朗战争相关的能源成本上升所驱动的。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042674056177111366/video/1 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042672863576986088/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump privately doubts the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen soon, despite publicly saying oil would be flowing again quickly, Reuters reports. "Trump appears in recent conversations ​with advisers to have conceded the ⁠Strait of Hormuz, a hub of global commerce that remains effectively shut despite a fragile ceasefire, is unlikely to completely reopen soon," a White House official said. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据路透社报道，特朗普总统私下怀疑霍尔木兹海峡很快会完全重新开放，尽管他公开表示石油将很快再次流动。“特朗普在最近与顾问的谈话中似乎承认，霍尔木兹海峡——一个尽管有脆弱停火但实际上仍处于关闭状态的全球商业中心——不太可能很快完全重新开放，”一位白宫官员说。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah supporters rallied outside Lebanon's government building, demanding the army arrest President Joseph Aoun and PM Nawaf Salam, calling them "subordinate to the Zionists." The protest followed Salam's announcement to demilitarize Beirut after extensive Israeli strikes on Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党支持者在黎巴嫩政府大楼外集会，要求军队逮捕总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）和总理纳吉布·米卡提（Nawaf Salam），称他们“从属于犹太复国主义者”。此前，在以色列对真主党进行大规模打击后，米卡提宣布贝鲁特非军事化。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Pakistan PM Sharif says the leadership of both the U.S. and Iran will start talks tomorrow in Islamabad — Reuters tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：巴基斯坦总理谢里夫表示，美国和伊朗的领导层将于明天在伊斯兰堡开始会谈——路透社推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 There are two possible scenarios: Either no agreement will be reached with Iran and the war will continue — in that case, the United States would have to deploy a ground component and become involved on a much larger scale, which would likely result in increased American casualties. Or an agreement will be reached, but it will be vague in practice and will allow both sides to save face. I rule out the possibility of a deal that fully satisfies only one side, whether Iran or the United States. P.S. In my opinion, they will not reach an agreement and the war will continue, because the reputational, political, and economic damage already inflicted on the United States could outweigh the potential human and technical losses Iran might suffer. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 有两种可能的情况：要么与伊朗达不成协议，战争继续——在这种情况下，美国将不得不部署地面部队并更大规模地介入，这可能会导致美国伤亡增加。要么达成协议，但在实践中会很模糊，并允许双方保全面子。我排除了达成一项仅完全满足一方（无论是伊朗还是美国）的协议的可能性。附言：在我看来，他们不会达成协议，战争将继续，因为美国已经遭受的声誉、政治和经济损害可能超过伊朗可能遭受的潜在人员和技术损失。推文

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 JD Vance departing for Islamabad: "We are willing to extend the open hand — but don't try to play us." Meanwhile Iran has added a new precondition for Saturday's talks: the release of its frozen assets must happen before negotiations begin, on top of the existing Lebanon ceasefire demand. Trump says the US is "loading up the ships" with weapons should talks collapse. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 JD·万斯启程前往伊斯兰堡：“我们愿意伸出援手——但不要试图耍我们。”与此同时，伊朗为周六的会谈增加了一个新的先决条件：除了现有的黎巴嫩停火要求外，其被冻结的资产必须在谈判开始前解冻。特朗普表示，如果会谈破裂，美国正在“装载武器”准备应对。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Tucker Carlson Network responds to Trump: Trump is under a level of pressure that most people cannot fathom, with rabid Israel Firsters viciously harassing him any time he dares to stray even slightly from their favorite country’s agenda. Their shameless pursuit is steadfast enough to make even a man like Donald Trump go mad. They are as persistent as any group in history, no matter how well the White House has treated them in the past. Trump is facing a level of pressure that is dark enough to make him abandon his campaign promises and morph into the precise kind of politician he once vowed to destroy. He would not have let that happen unless his personal stakes were really high.
text_zh: Tucker Carlson Network 回应特朗普：特朗普承受着大多数人无法想象的压力，每当他敢于稍微偏离他们最喜欢的国家的议程时，狂热的“以色列优先”分子就会恶毒地骚扰他。他们无耻的追求是如此坚定，足以让唐纳德·特朗普这样的人也发疯。无论白宫过去对待他们有多好，他们都是历史上最执着的群体之一。特朗普面临的压力之大，足以让他放弃竞选承诺，变成他曾经发誓要摧毁的那种政客。除非他的个人利害关系非常高，否则他不会让这种情况发生。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Donald Trump is pushing Israel to implement a ceasefire deal between Lebanon and Israel by Tuesday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12 : U.S. President Trump is pressuring Israel to pursue a truce in Lebanon as a goodwill gesture ahead of peace talks scheduled for Tuesday in Washington. A phone call between the Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors, joined by the US ambassador to Lebanon, is expected this evening to prepare for the talks. The U.S., Israel and Lebanon would prefer that any pause in fighting comes through negotiations with the Lebanese government, not as a result of Iranian pressure. Israel has not yet decided, but some senior officials believe it is the right move, noting that Israel would still be able to act against immediate threats, as was the case after the November 2024 ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 以色列第 12 频道：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普正在推动以色列在周二前实施黎巴嫩和以色列之间的停火协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列第 12 频道：美国总统特朗普正在向以色列施压，要求其在周二于华盛顿举行的和平会谈前，将黎巴嫩停火作为一种善意姿态。预计今晚将举行以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的电话会议，美国驻黎巴嫩大使也将参加，为会谈做准备。美国、以色列和黎巴嫩更希望任何战斗的暂停是通过与黎巴嫩政府的谈判实现的，而不是伊朗施压的结果。以色列尚未做出决定，但一些高级官员认为这是正确的举措，并指出以色列仍然能够针对直接威胁采取行动，就像 2024 年 11 月停火后那样。 @wfwitness

text: Iran ‌sees JD Vance as one of the most anti-war figures in Trump's inner circle. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 伊朗将 JD·万斯视为特朗普核心圈中最反战的人物之一。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 The French Army has released for the first time footage of interceptions of Iranian drones targeting the Gulf states. The video shows several engagements by Rafale fighter jets using MICA missiles. The video also shows shootdowns by Tigre attack helicopters. These were deployed during the war as a cheaper anti-drone alternative to Rafales. As a symbol of French munition stockpiles, the warning "out of amo" shows up several times on the Rafale HUD. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 法国军队首次发布了拦截针对海湾国家的伊朗无人机的画面。视频显示了阵风战斗机使用 MICA 导弹进行的几次交战。视频还显示了虎式攻击直升机的击落行动。这些直升机在战争期间被部署，作为阵风战斗机的一种更便宜的防无人机替代方案。作为法国弹药库存的象征，警告“弹药耗尽”（out of amo）在阵风战斗机的平视显示器（HUD）上多次出现。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "Hundreds of years from now, they will read with mouths wide open in astonishment." Khabar Network analysis: For the first time in history, the United States is giving concessions before negotiations. Iran's Speaker is demanding cash payment up front, stating bluntly "I have no trust in you." The panel notes Iran negotiated from strength, not weakness: "We hit so well that we have expectations much higher than this." An unprecedented reversal of the usual American playbook. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “几百年后，他们会张大嘴巴惊叹地阅读这段历史。” Khabar Network 分析：美国历史上第一次在谈判前做出让步。伊朗议长要求预付现金，直言不讳地说：“我不信任你们。”专家组指出，伊朗是从实力而非弱势地位进行谈判：“我们打得太好了，以至于我们的期望远高于此。”这是美国惯用剧本前所未有的逆转。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump privately doubts the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen soon, despite publicly saying oil will flow again quickly. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 特朗普私下怀疑霍尔木兹海峡很快会完全重新开放，尽管他公开表示石油将很快再次流动。来源：路透社

text: Pakistani Defense Minister Khawaja Asif reposts: Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫（Khawaja Asif）转发：必须约束以色列，美伊停火才能维持。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Acre, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Footage showcasing the interceptions of the recent barrage @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部阿卡（Acre）及上加利利地区周边响起红色警报。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 展示最近一轮拦截的画面 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: ‘In recent conversations with advisors, Trump has conceded that the Strait of Hormuz is unlikely to completely reopen anytime soon’ – Reuters @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：‘在最近与顾问的谈话中，特朗普承认霍尔木兹海峡不太可能很快完全重新开放’——路透社 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Pakistani Defense Minister Khawaja Asif reposts: Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫（Khawaja Asif）转发：必须约束以色列，美伊停火才能维持。

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "The IDF says it took steps to "minimize harm to civilians" in the strikes" Rafik Hariri Hospital in Beirut has begun DNA testing on human remains to identify dozens still missing after Wednesday’s massacre. Israeli strikes were so powerful they mangled bodies beyond recognition, with many victims arriving at hospitals in bags. Identification could take weeks.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“以色列国防军表示，它采取了措施‘最大限度地减少对平民的伤害’” 贝鲁特的拉菲克·哈里里医院（Rafik Hariri Hospital）已开始对人类遗骸进行 DNA 检测，以识别周三屠杀后仍失踪的数十人。以色列的袭击威力巨大，导致尸体面目全非，许多受害者被装在袋子里送往医院。身份识别可能需要数周时间。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif thanked the U.S. and Iran for accepting his invitation to Islamabad for negotiations which will begin Saturday, in an address to the nation. He described the negotiations as being make or break. "A temporary ceasefire has been announced, but now the more crucial phase is the long-term ceasefire, which is to resolve the entangled issues through negotiations, and this phase is parallel to what is known in English as make-and-break." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫在全国讲话中感谢美国和伊朗接受他的邀请前往伊斯兰堡进行谈判，谈判将于周六开始。他形容这次谈判是成败在此一举。 “临时停火已经宣布，但现在更关键的阶段是长期停火，即通过谈判解决纠缠不清的问题，这一阶段与英语中所说的‘成败在此一举’（make-and-break）相对应。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Preliminary reports suggest the withdrawal of Israeli forces to the Liberation Triangle (Muthallath al-Tahrir) after suffering significant losses in equipment and personnel on the outskirts of the city of Bint Jbeil following heavy clashes with Hezbollah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 初步报告显示，在与真主党发生激烈冲突后，以色列军队在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市郊区遭受了重大装备和人员损失，随后撤退至解放三角区（Muthallath al-Tahrir）。 @wfwitness

text: “Palantir Technologies Inc., the data analysis firm that provides militaries with artificial intelligence models, has agreed to a strategic partnership with the Israeli Defense Ministry to supply technology to help the country’s war effort.” — Bloomberg, January 12, 2024
text_zh: “为军队提供人工智能模型的分析公司 Palantir Technologies Inc. 已同意与以色列国防部建立战略合作伙伴关系，提供技术以帮助该国的战争努力。”——彭博社，2024 年 1 月 12 日

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says Wednesday's wide-scale strikes across Lebanon killed at least 180 Hezbollah members. Targets included over 100 sites in southern Lebanon, the Beqaa Valley, and Beirut, including Radwan Force HQs, intelligence division headquarters, and weapons depots. The IDF says strikes were carried out based on "precise, high-quality intelligence," enabling "simultaneous strikes in multiple areas within just one minute." Lebanon's health ministry reported over 350 killed. It did not differentiate between civilians and combatants. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军表示，周三在黎巴嫩各地进行的大规模袭击造成至少 180 名真主党成员死亡。目标包括黎巴嫩南部、贝卡谷地和贝鲁特的 100 多个地点，包括拉德万部队总部、情报部门总部和武器库。以色列国防军表示，袭击是基于“精确、高质量的情报”进行的，实现了“在一分钟内对多个区域进行同步打击”。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称有 350 多人死亡。它没有区分平民和战斗人员。推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistani PM Sharif says U.S. and Iranian leaders will begin talks in Islamabad tomorrow, aiming for a permanent ceasefire agreement. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫表示，美国和伊朗领导人将于明天在伊斯兰堡开始会谈，目标是达成永久停火协议。推文

text: Open Source Intel Shark bite caught on camera in Fernando de Noronha, Brazil. A nurse shark latched onto a snorkeler's leg after she swam too close. She was freed and treated with stitches. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042665198998241719/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴西费尔南多-迪诺罗尼亚群岛（Fernando de Noronha）拍摄到鲨鱼咬人事件。一名浮潜者游得太近后，一条护士鲨咬住了她的腿。她被救出并接受了缝合治疗。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042665198998241719/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian delegation aircraft have reportedly headed toward Pakistan after receiving information that Israel is halting strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon. ▪️ At the same time, according to Axios, Israel and Lebanon prefer to present the planned ceasefire as a goodwill gesture rather than as a result of Iranian pressure tied to ongoing negotiations with the United States. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 据报道，在收到以色列停止对黎巴嫩真主党袭击的消息后，伊朗代表团飞机已飞往巴基斯坦。▪️ 与此同时，据 Axios 报道，以色列和黎巴嫩更倾向于将计划中的停火作为一种善意姿态，而不是作为与美国正在进行的谈判相关的伊朗施压的结果。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 The Long Road to Slavyansk 📝 On the Slavyansk direction , fighting continues on the approaches to Rai-Aleksandrivka , where Russian units attempt to advance toward the village from two directions. Russian units attack from the Kaleniki side, advancing both toward Rai-Aleksandrivka and moving around it from the north toward the Dolyhy Forest . ➡️ As reported earlier , this settlement holds major tactical importance for the future assault on Slavyansk , so Ukrainian formations will attempt to hold it as long as possible. ➡️ To the south, after repelling enemy attacks on Lipovka , the Russian Armed Forces advanced in the Dibrova area, located near the M-03 highway . Russia's Defense Ministry announced the freeing of this settlement. 📌 Meanwhile, enemy units are mining approaches, establishing fortifications, and reinforcing strongpoints around the cities. Given the emphasis on drone-based defense, AFU command will likely focus on striking Russian supply and movement routes. So far, Russian forces are successfully disrupting enemy logistics . The approaches to Slavyansk and Kramatorsk will be harder to take due to lower settlement density and fewer buildings with basements suitable for accumulating infiltration groups. If you have updates or want us to highlight your unit's successes, you can write to us via the feedback bot @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 High-resolution map 📍 English version 📍 Online maps available by subscription at map.rybar.ru #digest #map #Kramatorsk #Russia #Slavyansk #Ukraine ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：📝 通往斯拉维扬斯克（Slavyansk）的长路 📝 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，通往赖-亚历山德罗夫卡（Rai-Aleksandrivka）的战斗仍在继续，俄罗斯部队试图从两个方向向该村庄推进。俄罗斯部队从卡列尼基（Kaleniki）一侧发起进攻，既向赖-亚历山德罗夫卡推进，又从北部绕过它向多利希森林（Dolyhy Forest）移动。 ➡️ 如前所述，该定居点对于未来对斯拉维扬斯克的突击具有重大的战术重要性，因此乌克兰部队将试图尽可能长时间地守住它。 ➡️ 在南部，在击退了敌人对利波夫卡（Lipovka）的袭击后，俄罗斯武装部队在靠近 M-03 公路的迪布罗瓦（Dibrova）地区取得了进展。俄罗斯国防部宣布解放了该定居点。 📌 与此同时，敌军正在埋设地雷、建立防御工事，并加强城市周围的据点。鉴于对无人机防御的重视，乌克兰武装部队指挥部可能会专注于打击俄罗斯的补给和移动路线。到目前为止，俄罗斯军队已成功扰乱了敌人的后勤。由于定居点密度较低且适合积聚渗透小组的地下室建筑较少，斯拉维扬斯克和克拉马托尔斯克（Kramatorsk）的周边地区将更难攻克。如果您有更新或希望我们突出您部队的成功，可以通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 写信给我们 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过 map.rybar.ru 订阅获得 #摘要 #地图 #克拉马托尔斯克 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has revealed details of its largest strike in Lebanon since the start of Operation Roaring Lion. Within a single minute, the IDF killed 180 alleged Hezbollah members across three areas simultaneously: Beirut, the Bekaa and southern…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF’s Military Intelligence directorate has assessed that at least 180 members were killed in Wednesday’s widespread strikes. Yet, the count is not final. According to Lebanon’s health ministry, ~300 people were killed in the same wave of strikes. This means at least, using the IDF's assessment, 60% of the dead were Hezbollah members – a ratio the IDF considers favourable, but it also means the death of 120 civilians using the IDF's own data. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方披露了自‘咆哮狮行动’（Operation Roaring Lion）开始以来其在黎巴嫩最大规模袭击的细节。在一分钟内，以色列国防军在贝鲁特、贝卡和南部三个地区同时杀死了 180 名所谓的真主党成员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军军事情报局评估称，周三的大规模袭击中至少有 180 名成员死亡。然而，统计数字并非最终结果。据黎巴嫩卫生部称，在同一波袭击中约有 300 人死亡。这意味着，根据以色列国防军的评估，至少 60% 的死者是真主党成员——以色列国防军认为这一比例是有利的，但也意味着根据以色列国防军自己的数据，有 120 名平民死亡。 @wfwitness

text: Acre Today Hezbullah fired dozens up to 100's of rockets towards Israeli settlements and towns in response to the grave Jewish aggression in Lebanon
text_zh: 阿卡今日：真主党向以色列定居点和城镇发射了数十枚至数百枚火箭弹，以回应犹太人在黎巴嫩的严重侵略

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "With the announcement of a ceasefire in Lebanon expected tomorrow, and the release of frozen Iranian funds" Nether has been officially confirmed yet. Attacks didn't stop in Lebanon and Qatar didn't announce anything yet about the funds.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“随着明天预计宣布黎巴嫩停火，以及解冻伊朗资金” 尚未有任何官方确认。黎巴嫩的袭击没有停止，卡塔尔也没有就资金问题宣布任何消息。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah said Israel committed a "major massacre" today by targeting the government serail in Nabatieh, killing 13 State Security personnel. The group accused Israel of blatantly violating Lebanese sovereignty and institutions, and criticised the Lebanese government for rushing into direct negotiations under fire while abandoning the resistance’s achievements. Hezbollah called for national unity and warned that concessions only lead to more destruction. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党表示，以色列今天通过针对纳巴提耶（Nabatieh）的政府大楼，杀死了 13 名国家安全人员，犯下了“重大屠杀”。该组织指责以色列公然侵犯黎巴嫩主权和机构，并批评黎巴嫩政府在炮火下仓促进行直接谈判，同时放弃了抵抗运动的成果。真主党呼吁民族团结，并警告说让步只会导致更多的破坏。 @wfwitness
